children.name: shouldDisplayErrorsIfPasswordHasInvalidPatternTest
parameters: password not contains uppercase symbols
e@jx!%^
Password: 5-20 chars, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one special char required.

children.name: shouldDisplayErrorsIfPasswordHasInvalidPatternTest
parameters: password not contains lowercase symbols
JE*@*$WLE#I
Password: 5-20 chars, at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one special char required.

children.name: shouldDisplayErrorsIfUsernameHasInvalidPatternTest
parameters: username contains multiple specials in a row
nigel.mil._.-ls
Username: 6-30 chars, lowercase letters, digits, ["_", "-", "."]. Must start/end with a letter or digit and no consecutive special chars.
